creator: ev.lyapin@gmail.com
text:
Hello,

To support the new GeoIP2 databases, libmaxminddb support should be added to geoipbackend, Maxmind will discontinue free GeoIP Lite Legacy.

https://support.maxmind.com/geolite-legacy-discontinuation-notice/

FreeBSD port has support for legacy GeoIP databases:
GEOIP_LIB_DEPENDS=      libyaml-cpp.so:devel/yaml-cpp \
                        libGeoIP.so:net/GeoIP

GeoIP2 databases provided by net/libmaxminddb library.

PowerDNS merged the feature on Feb 2018:
https://github.com/PowerDNS/pdns/pull/6128

Best regards,
Eugene
